records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.252 - Hanan ibn Sudayr narrated from his father:
He said: 'I entered a bathhouse in Medina with my father, grandfather, and uncle. There was a man in the changing room.’
Imam (as) said: ”Where are you people from?" We replied: ”From the people of Al-Iraq” .
Imam (as) said: ”Which part of Al-Iraq?” We replied: ”From Al-Kufa”.
Imam (as) said: ”Welcome, O’ people of Kufa, you are the closest to us.”
Then He (as) said: ”Why are you not wearing a covering (waistcloth)? For Messenger of Allah (sw) has said that 'The private parts of a believer are forbidden for another believer to see.'"
My uncle then sent for a piece of cloth, cut it into four pieces, and each of us took one before we entered (bathhouse).
When we entered into the warm room (of bathhouse), the man turned to my grandfather and said: "O’ elderly man, why do you not use henna (dye)?"
My grandfather said: "I have seen someone better than you and me who did not use it."
Imam (as) said: "And Who is better than me?"
My grandfather replied: “I saw (Imam (as)) Ali ibn Abi Talib and he did not dye his hair."
He (as) lowered his head and sweat fell from him, and said: “You have spoken truth and sincere.
Then Imam (as) said: "O’ elderly man, if you dye your hair, the Messenger of Allah (sw) also dyed his hair, and He (sw) is better than (Imam (as)) Ali. And if you choose not to dye, then you have Sunnah of (Imam (as)) Ali as an example."
When we left the bathhouse, we asked about the man in the room, and it was told they are Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as), with his son Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as).”
records.arabicText: 252- وَ رَوَى حَنَانُ بْنُ سَدِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ أَنَا وَ أَبِي وَ جَدِّي وَ عَمِّي حَمَّاماً فِي اَلْمَدِينَةِ فَإِذَا رَجُلٌ فِي بَيْتِ اَلْمَسْلَخِ فَقَالَ لَنَا مِمَّنِ اَلْقَوْمُ فَقُلْنَا مِنْ أَهْلِ اَلْعِرَاقِ فَقَالَ وَ أَيُّ اَلْعِرَاقِ فَقُلْنَا اَلْكُوفِيُّونَ فَقَالَ «مَرْحَباً بِكُمْ يَا أَهْلَ اَلْكُوفَةِ وَ أَهْلاً أَنْتُمُ اَلشِّعَارُ دُونَ اَلدِّثَارِ» ثُمَّ قَالَ «وَ مَا يَمْنَعُكُمْ مِنَ اَلْإِزَارِ » فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ «عَوْرَةُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ عَلَى اَلْمُؤْمِنِ حَرَامٌ» قَالَ فَبَعَثَ عَمِّي إِلَى كِرْبَاسَةٍ فَشَقَّهَا بِأَرْبَعَةٍ ثُمَّ أَخَذَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ مِنَّا وَاحِداً ثُمَّ دَخَلْنَا فِيهَا فَلَمَّا كُنَّا فِي اَلْبَيْتِ اَلْحَارِّ صَمَدَ لِجَدِّي فَقَالَ «يَا كَهْلُ مَا يَمْنَعُكَ مِنَ اَلْخِضَابِ» فَقَالَ لَهُ جَدِّي أَدْرَكْتُ مَنْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ مِنِّي وَ مِنْكَ لاَ يَخْتَضِبُ فَقَالَ «وَ مَنْ ذَاكَ اَلَّذِي هُوَ خَيْرٌ مِنِّي» فَقَالَ أَدْرَكْتُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ لاَ يَخْتَضِبُ فَنَكَسَ رَأْسَهُ وَ تَصَابَّ عَرَقاً وَقَالَ «صَدَقْتَ وَ بَرِرْتَ» ثُمَّ قَالَ «يَا كَهْلُ إِنْ تَخْتَضِبْ فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَدْ خَضَبَ وَ هُوَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ إِنْ تَتْرُكْ فَلَكَ بِعَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أُسْوَةٌ» قَالَ فَلَمَّا خَرَجْنَا مِنَ اَلْحَمَّامِ سَأَلْنَا عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ فِي اَلْمَسْلَخِ فَإِذَا هُوَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ اَلْحُسَيْنِ وَ مَعَهُ اِبْنُهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.252 - Hanan ibn Sudayr narrated from his father:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
He said: 'I entered a bathhouse in Medina with my father, grandfather, and uncle. There was a man in the changing room.’
Imam (as) said: ”Where are you people from?" We replied: ”From the people of Al-Iraq” .
Imam (as) said: ”Which part of Al-Iraq?” We replied: ”From Al-Kufa”.
Imam (as) said: ”Welcome, O’ people of Kufa, you are the closest to us.”
Then He (as) said: ”Why are you not wearing a covering (waistcloth)? For Messenger of Allah (sw) has said that 'The private parts of a believer are forbidden for another believer to see.'"
My uncle then sent for a piece of cloth, cut it into four pieces, and each of us took one before we entered (bathhouse).
When we entered into the warm room (of bathhouse), the man turned to my grandfather and said: "O’ elderly man, why do you not use henna (dye)?"
My grandfather said: "I have seen someone better than you and me who did not use it."
Imam (as) said: "And Who is better than me?"
My grandfather replied: “I saw (Imam (as)) Ali ibn Abi Talib and he did not dye his hair."
He (as) lowered his head and sweat fell from him, and said: “You have spoken truth and sincere.
Then Imam (as) said: "O’ elderly man, if you dye your hair, the Messenger of Allah (sw) also dyed his hair, and He (sw) is better than (Imam (as)) Ali. And if you choose not to dye, then you have Sunnah of (Imam (as)) Ali as an example."
When we left the bathhouse, we asked about the man in the room, and it was told they are Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as), with his son Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as).”

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.253 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
'The thigh is not considered part of the 'awrah (private parts).'
records.arabicText: 253 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْفَخِذُ لَيْسَ مِنَ اَلْعَوْرَةِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.253 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: 'The thigh is not considered part of the 'awrah (private parts).'

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.254 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Nuura (depilatory paste) is a purifier."
records.arabicText: 254 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلنُّورَةُ طَهُورٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.254 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Nuura (depilatory paste) is a purifier."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.255 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
'Remove the hair from your bodies, for it enhances (your appearance).'
records.arabicText: 255 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَلْقُوا اَلشَّعْرَ عَنْكُمْ فَإِنَّهُ يُحَسِّنُ.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.256 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Whoever wishes to use Nuura (depilatory paste), let him take some of it and place it on the tip of his nose and say:
Allāhumma irḥam Sulaymān ibn Dāwūd ‘alayhi al-salām kamā amarānā bil-nūrah
'O’ Allah (swt), have mercy on Solomon, son of David (as), as he instructed us regarding the depilatory paste (Nuura).'
If Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, wills, the paste will not cause him any harm.
records.arabicText: 256 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَتَنَوَّرَ فَلْيَأْخُذْ مِنَ اَلنُّورَةِ وَ يَجْعَلُهُ عَلَى طَرَفِ أَنْفِهِ وَ يَقُولُ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِرْحَمْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنَ دَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ كَمَا أَمَرَنَا بِالنُّورَةِ فَإِنَّهُ لاَ تُحْرِقُهُ اَلنُّورَةُ إِنْ شَاءَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ.»
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.256 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Whoever wishes to use Nuura (depilatory paste), let him take some of it and place it on the tip of his nose and say:
Allāhumma irḥam Sulaymān ibn Dāwūd ‘alayhi al-salām kamā amarānā bil-nūrah
'O’ Allah (swt), have mercy on Solomon, son of David (as), as he instructed us regarding the depilatory paste (Nuura).'
If Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, wills, the paste will not cause him any harm.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.257 - It was narrated that "Whoever sits while applying Nuura (depilatory paste), he is at risk of developing a hernia."
records.arabicText: 257 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ مَنْ جَلَسَ وَ هُوَ مُتَنَوِّرٌ خِيفَ عَلَيْهِ اَلْفَتْقُ.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.258 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"I like for a believer to use Nuura (depilatory paste) every fifteen days."
records.arabicText: 258 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أُحِبُّ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَطَّلِيَ فِي كُلِّ خَمْسَةَ عَشَرَ يَوْماً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.258 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "I like for a believer to use Nuura (depilatory paste) every fifteen days."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.259 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The practice (sunnah) for using Nuura (depilatory paste) is every fifteen days. If twenty days pass without using it and you lack it, then borrow for the sake of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."
records.arabicText: 259 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلسُّنَّةُ فِي اَلنُّورَةِ فِي كُلِّ خَمْسَةَ عَشَرَ يَوْماً فَإِنْ أَتَتْ عَلَيْكَ عِشْرُونَ يَوْماً وَ لَيْسَ عِنْدَكَ فَاسْتَقْرِضْ عَلَى اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.259 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The practice (sunnah) for using Nuura (depilatory paste) is every fifteen days. If twenty days pass without using it and you lack it, then borrow for the sake of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.260 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever believes in Allah (swt) and the Last Day (Qiyamah) should not leave the hair of their pubic region untrimmed for more than forty days, and it is not permissible for a woman who believes in Allah (swt) and the Last Day (Qiyamah) to leave it untrimmed for more than twenty days."
records.arabicText: 260 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: « «مَنْ كٰانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللّٰهِ وَ اَلْيَوْمِ اَلْآخِرِ» فَلاَ يَتْرُكْ عَانَتَهُ فَوْقَ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْماً وَ لاَ يَحِلُّ لاِمْرَأَةٍ تُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَ اَلْيَوْمِ اَلْآخِرِ أَنْ تَدَعَ ذَلِكَ مِنْهَا فَوْقَ عِشْرِينَ يَوْماً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.260 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever believes in Allah (swt) and the Last Day (Qiyamah) should not leave the hair of their pubic region untrimmed for more than forty days, and it is not permissible for a woman who believes in Allah (swt) and the Last Day (Qiyamah) to leave it untrimmed for more than twenty days."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.261 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Shave the abdomen hair for both males and females." (And in another version, it includes armpit hair).
records.arabicText: 261 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «اِحْلِقُوا شَعْرَ اَلْبَطْنِ لِلذَّكَرِ وَ اَلْأُنْثَى.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.262 - And Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) would rub Nuura (depilatory paste) to his armpits in the bathhouse and say:
'Plucking the armpit hair weakens the shoulders and diminishes (weakens) the eyesight.'"
records.arabicText: 262 - وَ كَانَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَطْلِي إِبْطَيْهِ فِي اَلْحَمَّامِ وَ يَقُولُ «نَتْفُ اَلْإِبْطِ يُضْعِفُ اَلْمَنْكِبَيْنِ وَ يُوهِي وَ يُضْعِفُ اَلْبَصَرَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.262 - And Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) would rub Nuura (depilatory paste) to his armpits in the bathhouse and say:
records.thaqalaynMatn: 'Plucking the armpit hair weakens the shoulders and diminishes (weakens) the eyesight.'"

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.263 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Shaving (unwanted hair) is better than plucking them and using Nuura (depilatory paste) is better than shaving them."
records.arabicText: 263 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «حَلْقُهُ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ نَتْفِهِ وَ طَلْيُهُ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ حَلْقِهِ.»
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.263 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Shaving (unwanted hair) is better than plucking them and using Nuura (depilatory paste) is better than shaving them."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.264 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Removing armpit hair eliminates unpleasant odors and is a means of purification and a practice (Sunnah) that was commanded by the Good and Pure Prophet (sw)."
records.arabicText: 264 - وَقَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «نَتْفُ اَلْإِبْطِ يَنْفِي اَلرَّائِحَةَ اَلْمَكْرُوهَةَ وَ هُوَ طَهُورٌ وَ سُنَّةٌ مِمَّا أَمَرَ بِهِ اَلطَّيِّبُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.264 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Removing armpit hair eliminates unpleasant odors and is a means of purification and a practice (Sunnah) that was commanded by the Good and Pure Prophet (sw)."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.265 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
'None of you should allow the hair under his armpits to grow long, for the devil takes it as a shield to hide behind.'
records.arabicText: 265 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «لاَ يُطَوِّلَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ شَعْرَ إِبْطَيْهِ فَإِنَّ اَلشَّيْطَانَ يَتَّخِذُهُ مِجَنّاً يَسْتَتِرُ بِهِ.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.267 – (Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Farisi Al-Fattal narrates from The Messenger of Allah (sw) ):
“Applying Nuura (depilatory paste) on Jumu’ah, it is said that it can lead to leprosy."
records.arabicText: 267 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّهَا فِي يَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ تُورِثُ اَلْبَرَصَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.267 – (Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Farisi Al-Fattal narrates from The Messenger of Allah (sw) ):
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Applying Nuura (depilatory paste) on Jumu’ah, it is said that it can lead to leprosy."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.268 - Al-Rayyan ibn Al-Salt narrated from someone, who narrated from Abu Al-Hasan, Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), said:
"Whoever puts on Nuura (depilatory paste) on Jumu’ah and is afflicted with leprosy, let him blame no one but himself."
records.arabicText: 268 - وَ رَوَى اَلرَّيَّانُ بْنُ اَلصَّلْتِ عَمَّنْ أَخْبَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ - «مَنْ تَنَوَّرَ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ فَأَصَابَهُ اَلْبَرَصُ فَلاَ يَلُومَنَّ إِلاَّ نَفْسَهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.268 - Al-Rayyan ibn Al-Salt narrated from someone, who narrated from Abu Al-Hasan, Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever puts on Nuura (depilatory paste) on Jumu’ah and is afflicted with leprosy, let him blame no one but himself."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.269 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever applies depilatory substances (to remove body hair) and dyes with henna, Allah (swt), the Most High, protects him from three things: leprosy, vitiligo (a skin disorder), and ‘al-ākilah’ (a type of skin disease or severe wound infection) until the next time he applies it."
records.arabicText: 269 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنِ اِطَّلَى وَ اِخْتَضَبَ بِالْحِنَّاءِ آمَنَهُ اَللَّهُ تَعَالَى مِنْ ثَلاَثِ خِصَالٍ اَلْجُذَامِ وَ اَلْبَرَصِ وَ اَلْآكِلَةِ إِلَى طَلْيَةٍ مِثْلِهَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.269 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever applies depilatory substances (to remove body hair) and dyes with henna, Allah (swt), the Most High, protects him from three things: leprosy, vitiligo (a skin disorder), and ‘al-ākilah’ (a type of skin disease or severe wound infection) until the next time he applies it."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.270 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Applying henna after the use of Nuura (depilatory paste) is a protection against leprosy and vitiligo."
records.arabicText: 270 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْحِنَّاءُ عَلَى أَثَرِ اَلنُّورَةِ أَمَانٌ مِنَ اَلْجُذَامِ وَ اَلْبَرَصِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.270 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Applying henna after the use of Nuura (depilatory paste) is a protection against leprosy and vitiligo."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.271 - It is narrated (from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah) that he narrates:
"Whoever applies a depilatory substance and massages himself with henna from head to toe, Allah (swt) removes poverty from him."
records.arabicText: 271 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ مَنِ اِطَّلَى وَ تَدَلَّكَ بِالْحِنَّاءِ مِنْ قَرْنِهِ إِلَى قَدَمِهِ نَفَى اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ اَلْفَقْرَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.271 - It is narrated (from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah) that he narrates:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever applies a depilatory substance and massages himself with henna from head to toe, Allah (swt) removes poverty from him."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.272 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Dye with henna, for it improves eyesight, promotes hair growth, gives a pleasant fragrance, and calms the wife”.
records.arabicText: 272 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «اِخْتَضِبُوا بِالْحِنَّاءِ فَإِنَّهُ يَجْلُو اَلْبَصَرَ وَ يُنْبِتُ اَلشَّعْرَ وَ يُطَيِّبُ اَلرِّيحَ وَ يُسَكِّنُ اَلزَّوْجَةَ»
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.272 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Dye with henna, for it improves eyesight, promotes hair growth, gives a pleasant fragrance, and calms the wife”.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.273 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Henna removes the odors, increases radiance in the face, improves breath, and beautifies one's offspring."
records.arabicText: 273 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْحِنَّاءُ يَذْهَبُ بِالسَّهَكِ وَ يَزِيدُ فِي مَاءِ اَلْوَجْهِ وَ يُطَيِّبُ اَلنَّكْهَةَ وَ يُحَسِّنُ اَلْوَلَدَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.273 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Henna removes the odors, increases radiance in the face, improves breath, and beautifies one's offspring."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.274 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Dyeing (the hair or beard) is the tradition of Muhammad (sw) and it is part of the Sunnah."
records.arabicText: 274 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْخِضَابُ هَدْيُ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ هُوَ مِنَ اَلسُّنَّةِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.274 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Dyeing (the hair or beard) is the tradition of Muhammad (sw) and it is part of the Sunnah."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.275 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"There is no harm in any kind of dyeing."
records.arabicText: 275 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ بَأْسَ بِالْخِضَابِ كُلِّهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.275 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "There is no harm in any kind of dyeing."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.276 - Al-Hasan ibn al-Jahm entered upon Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) who had dyed his hair with black dye.
Imam (as) said: "Indeed, there is a reward in dyeing. Dyeing and grooming are among those things which increase the chastity of women, and some women have abandoned chastity because their husbands have neglected grooming themselves."
(ibn Al-Jahm) replied to Him: "We have heard that henna increases gray hair?”
Imam (as) said: “What increases gray hair? Gray hair increases every day."
records.arabicText: 276 - وَ دَخَلَ اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ اَلْجَهْمِ عَلَى أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: وَ قَدِ اِخْتَضَبَ بِالسَّوَادِ فَقَالَ «إِنَّ فِي اَلْخِضَابِ أَجْراً وَ اَلْخِضَابُ وَ اَلتَّهْيِئَةُ مِمَّا يَزِيدُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي عِفَّةِ اَلنِّسَاءِ وَ لَقَدْ تَرَكَتْ نِسَاءٌ اَلْعِفَّةَ بِتَرْكِ أَزْوَاجِهِنَّ اَلتَّهْيِئَةَ» فَقَالَ لَهُ بَلَغَنَا أَنَّ اَلْحِنَّاءَ تَزِيدُ فِي اَلشَّيْبِ فَقَالَ «أَيُّ شَيْءٍ يَزِيدُ فِي اَلشَّيْبِ وَ اَلشَّيْبُ يَزِيدُ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ»
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.276 - Al-Hasan ibn al-Jahm entered upon Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) who had dyed his hair with black dye.
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Indeed, there is a reward in dyeing. Dyeing and grooming are among those things which increase the chastity of women, and some women have abandoned chastity because their husbands have neglected grooming themselves."
(ibn Al-Jahm) replied to Him: "We have heard that henna increases gray hair?”
Imam (as) said: “What increases gray hair? Gray hair increases every day."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.277 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about dyeing the hair, and He said:
"The Messenger of Allah (sw) used to dye, and we still have some of his hair with us."
records.arabicText: 277 - وَ سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلْخِضَابِ فَقَالَ «كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ يَخْتَضِبُ وَ هَذَا شَعْرُهُ عِنْدَنَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.277 - Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about dyeing the hair, and He said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The Messenger of Allah (sw) used to dye, and we still have some of his hair with us."
